creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232655
Patch

Add noflavors, as there's no sense in flavoring this port. This fixes Q/A:

Error: Package names are not unique with flavors:
py38: terminator-2.1.1_1
py39: terminator-2.1.1_1
py37: terminator-2.1.1_1
py310: terminator-2.1.1_1
py311: terminator-2.1.1_1
Error: maybe use <flavor>_PKGNAMEPREFIX/SUFFIX.
*** Error code 1
